name: Influenza Vaccine Codes
description: CVX, CPT, and HCPCS codes for influenza (flu) vaccines. Used in immunization measures for both pediatric and adult populations. Includes injectable and intranasal formulations.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets
